title: nassella longiglumis
intro: Nassella longiglumis, also known as Junegrass, is a perennial grass native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, burns, and skin irritations. The plant is said to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating headaches, and soothing digestive issues. Nassella longiglumis can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and its roots and leaves can be used in salves and ointments for topical application.
